rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §54.031 governs admissibility of hearsay statements by abuse victims in juvenile delinquency hearings. The two provisions share no subject matter overlap.
quote: This section applies to a hearing under this title in which a child is alleged to be a delinquent child on the basis of a violation of any of the following provisions of the Penal Code
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed change.
